idea: Consumer Stress Surge via Google Trends Baking Supplies Spike

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for baking supplies

behavior: Increase in searches for baking supplies signals rising home cooking and possible consumer stress or lockdown anticipation.

market_impact.rationale: Rising consumer stress often causes defensive consumer staples buying but signals risk aversion for broader consumer sectors.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLY if baking supplies Google Trends rises more than 15% WoW for 2 consecutive weeks
trade_logic.exit: Exit after Google Trends falls below 10% WoW increase for 2 weeks or after 4 weeks

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Google Trends spikes in baking supplies happen multiple times yearly due to consumer stress or event-driven cooking booms.

idea: Labor Jobs Surge in Temporary Staffing vs XLY Weakness

data.source: Weekly temporary staffing job postings data

behavior: Rising temporary job postings while consumer discretionary ETF lags indicates cautious hiring and consumer spending uncertainty.

market_impact.rationale: Temporary hiring surges often precede mixed consumer discretionary performance due to consumer caution.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLY if temporary staffing postings rise 10% WoW and XLY price down 2% WoW
trade_logic.exit: Exit after temporary staffing postings normalize or XLY recovers 3% WoW

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Temporary staffing data updates weekly and can spike with economic uncertainty multiple times yearly.

idea: Freight Logistics Surge in Railcar Loadings vs Industrial ETF Pullback
behavior: Unexpected surge in railcar loadings while industrial sector ETF declines may indicate inventory build-up or supply chain stress.

market_impact.rationale: Rising freight shipments concurrent with sector weakness often precede inventory corrections and price pullbacks.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI if railcar loadings rise >5% WoW but XLI falls >1% WoW
trade_logic.exit: Exit after railcar loadings drop below 3% WoW increase or XLI rebounds 2%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Railcar loadings data updates weekly and often show volatility around economic cycles.

idea: Local Economy Weirdness: Surge in Small Business Tax Delinquency Notices

data.source: Public scrape of municipal tax delinquency notices

behavior: Spike in small business tax delinquency notices signals localized economic stress impacting retail sector.

market_impact.rationale: Rising small business financial stress often precedes consumer discretionary sector weakness.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLY if tax delinquency notices rise 20% WoW for 2 consecutive weeks
trade_logic.exit: Exit after notices fall below 10% WoW increase or after 6 weeks

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Municipal delinquency notices spike seasonally and with economic stress, reliably appearing multiple times yearly.

idea: Political Insider Filing Surge in Healthcare Sector

data.source: SEC insider filing API for healthcare sector stocks

behavior: Surge in insider selling filings in healthcare signals potential regulatory or earnings concerns.

market_impact.rationale: Insider selling often predicts near-term sector softness, especially in regulated sectors like healthcare.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLV if insider selling filings exceed 3x 30-day average on a given day
trade_logic.exit: Exit after filings normalize below 1.5x average or after 10 trading days

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Insider filing spikes in healthcare happen regularly around earnings and policy news.

idea: Macro Input Pressure: Weekly Natural Gas Inventory Spike vs Energy ETF Drop

data.source: FRED weekly natural gas storage data

behavior: Rapid build in natural gas inventories while energy ETF drops signals oversupply and bearish pressure on energy prices.

market_impact.rationale: Energy inventories rising sharply usually precede energy price and sector pullbacks.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLE if natural gas inventories rise >5% WoW and XLE declines >2% WoW
trade_logic.exit: Exit after inventories stabilize or XLE recovers 3%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly natural gas inventory reports and energy ETF volatility frequently align.

idea: Attention Sentiment: Surge in Google Trends for Debt Consolidation Searches

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'debt consolidation'

behavior: Spike in debt consolidation interest signals rising consumer financial stress, bearish for discretionary spending.

market_impact.rationale: Higher consumer debt stress often reduces discretionary consumption and sector performance.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLY if debt consolidation searches increase >20% WoW for 2 consecutive weeks
trade_logic.exit: Exit after search interest normalizes below 10% WoW increase or after 6 weeks

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Debt-related search spikes appear repeatedly during consumer stress cycles.

idea: Travel Mobility: Weekly Google Trends Spike in 'Last Minute Flights' Searches

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'last minute flights'

behavior: Spike in last minute flight searches signals near-term surge in travel bookings, bullish for travel sector.

market_impact.rationale: Increased last-minute travel interest often precedes upward travel spending and discretionary sector strength.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLY if last minute flight searches increase >25% WoW for 2 weeks
trade_logic.exit: Exit after searches drop below 10% WoW increase or after 5 weeks

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Travel interest surges seasonally and due to event-driven travel needs are common.

idea: Consumer Stress: Weekly Google Trends Spike in Payday Loan Searches

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for payday loans

behavior: Spike in payday loan searches indicates rising consumer cash flow stress, bearish for discretionary spending.

market_impact.rationale: Higher consumer stress reduces spending power in discretionary sectors.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLY if payday loan searches rise >20% WoW for 2 consecutive weeks
trade_logic.exit: Exit after searches drop below 10% WoW increase or after 6 weeks

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Payday loan search spikes reflect consumer stress cycles seen multiple times per year.

idea: Freight Logistics: Weekly Surge in Trucking Fuel Prices vs XLI Weakness
behavior: Rising trucking fuel costs concurrent with industrial ETF weakness signals margin pressure on logistics-heavy industries.

market_impact.rationale: Higher fuel costs squeeze industrial margins, pressuring sector performance.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI if diesel prices rise >3% WoW and XLI falls >1.5% WoW
trade_logic.exit: Exit after fuel prices stabilize or XLI rebounds 3%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly fuel price volatility combined with sector reactions is common.

idea: Attention Sentiment: Weekly Google Trends Spike in 'Work from Home' Job Searches

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'work from home jobs'

behavior: Rising interest in WFH jobs signals labor market shift and potential tech sector volatility.

market_impact.rationale: Tech sector benefits from increased remote work trends and associated tech demand.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLK if WFH job searches rise >15% WoW for 2 weeks
trade_logic.exit: Exit after searches drop below 10% WoW increase or after 5 weeks

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: WFH job interest fluctuates frequently as labor market conditions evolve.

idea: Local Economy Weirdness: Weekly Increase in Business License Applications

data.source: Public scrape of weekly business license application counts

behavior: Spike in new business licenses signals entrepreneurial optimism, bullish for consumer discretionary.

market_impact.rationale: More new businesses generally correlate with rising consumer spending and economic expansion.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLY if business license applications rise >20% WoW for 2 weeks
trade_logic.exit: Exit after applications fall below 10% WoW increase or after 6 weeks

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: New business formation data shows frequent cyclical spikes.

idea: Macro Input Pressure: Weekly Increase in Producer Price Index for Metals

data.source: FRED weekly producer price index for metals

behavior: Rising input costs for metals pressures manufacturing margins, bearish for industrial materials sector.

market_impact.rationale: Higher input prices reduce profitability in materials and industrial sectors.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLB if metal PPI rises >0.5% WoW for 2 weeks
trade_logic.exit: Exit after PPI growth slows below 0.2% WoW or after 4 weeks

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: PPI data updates weekly and often shows volatile short-term trends.

idea: Consumer Stress: Weekly Google Trends Spike in 'Unemployment Benefits' Searches

behavior: Spike in unemployment benefits searches signals rising labor stress, bearish for consumer discretionary.

market_impact.rationale: Rising unemployment concerns reduce consumer spending power.

trade_logic.exit: Exit after searches normalize below 10% WoW increase or after 6 weeks
